Asplenium trudellii is a species of fern in the family Aspleniaceae, native to the Himalayan region. 

The health benefits of Asplenium trudellii are not well-documented, but the Asplenium genus as a whole is known for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. 

The bioactive constituents of Asplenium trudellii, as with other fern species, may include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other polyphenolic compounds.
